metadata.description: Andre Zagatti's Claude Code skills — a growing collection, grouped into plugins by category.

plugins.name: headless-clis
plugins.description: Drive coding CLIs (OpenAI Codex, Claude Code, xAI Grok, Google Antigravity) in headless/print mode — delegate a task, get a cross-vendor second opinion, or produce structured output for scripts. Each skill documents that CLI's real headless invocation, permission model, output shape, and model/effort support, verified empirically. Includes a router skill to pick the right CLI.
